title: BreweryX (For SFTV Earth 2)
description: A resource pack created for SFTV Earth 2 which has textures for the plugin BreweryX
body:
![Banner of Earth From Space with the SFTV Earth 2 Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf15be49fce13f9336b6c1b41128a3b5e8a0efda_0.webp)
This resource pack contains resources for the plugin [BreweryX](https://modrinth.com/plugin/breweryx)! It adds tons of unique textures for each drink, so that way, you don't have to use

This project was created for use in and by [SFTV Earth 2](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sftv-earth-2-(official-modpack))! Check it out for the best minecraft earth experience!

This resource pack contains _2_ versions, one- which works exclusively for SFTV Earth 2 and has textures for SFTV Earth 2 exclusive items, as well as one which contains base BreweryX textures. Make sure you download the right version! The SFTV Earth 2 version _also_ contains the base items, so there is no need to download both.

## Required:
This project requires [CIT Resewn!](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) If you do not have it, the textures will not show up!

## Other:
Join us on [Discord](https://discord.gg/P5J87fNE6h[Discord](https://discord.gg/P5J87fNE6h)), if you haven't already!

Join the [SFTV Discord](https://discord.gg/f229kZVb37) as well!
